name: Advanced skill — MCP tools, conditional workflow, checklist
query: Build a Claude Code skill that queries BigQuery for sales data and generates reports using the BigQuery MCP server. It should have different workflows for daily summaries vs monthly deep-dives, and include a progress checklist for the monthly workflow. Category: data.
expected_behavior: Name uses gerund form, kebab-case, ≤64 chars, lowercase+hyphens only, no reserved words
Description starts with 3rd-person verb, includes 'Use when' with 3+ trigger phrases, no XML tags
Front matter uses ONLY standard fields, under 1024 characters total
MCP tools use fully qualified names: BigQuery:tool_name format
Conditional workflow present: decision point branching between daily and monthly paths
Monthly workflow includes a copyable checklist pattern for progress tracking
Output template defined for the report format (strict or flexible as appropriate)
Verifiable intermediate outputs: plan-validate-execute pattern for the data query
Provides one recommended default approach, not multiple equivalent choices
Progressive disclosure used — detailed schemas in separate reference files if needed
Post-delivery section recommends testing with Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus plus 3+ evaluations
